zh.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Saarbrücken於1160年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀吉爾卡包格。她和Gerhard I. VON KYRBURG至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1220年享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Saarbrücken was born in 1160, in Kyrburg, Kirn, Bad Kreuznach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Gerhard I. VON KYRBURG. She died in 1220, at the age of 60.
